array.string: cd "__REPO_ROOT__" && source .venv/bin/activate && export ORCH_QUEUE_PROFILE=launchd_local CELERY_DISPATCH_QUEUE=orch_dispatch_launchd_local CELERY_EXECUTE_QUEUE=orch_execute_launchd_local CELERY_HEARTBEAT_QUEUE=orch_heartbeat_launchd_local CELERY_S3_FILES_INGEST_QUEUE=orch_fileapp_ingest_launchd_local CELERY_SOURCE_LIST_INGEST_QUEUE=orch_fileapp_source_list_launchd_local CELERY_FILEAPP_MAILING_ASSOC_QUEUE=orch_fileapp_mailing_assoc_launchd_local && exec uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7777
